title: DoorDash (DASH) Expands Partner Base to Boost Prospects
text: DoorDash (DASH) partners with The Kroger Co. to boost its total orders and marketplace gross order volume, and boost e-commerce on its platform.

title: Kroger Teams With DoorDash for Flower Delivery as Grocers Diversify
text: Kroger is delivering flowers on demand via DoorDash in a bid to differentiate its offerings. The supermarket group announced Monday (Dec. 12) that, across its various supermarket chains, it is partnering with the aggregator to bring floral arrangements and sushi to consumers' doors, a move to gain a greater share of consumers' digital spending by expanding its offerings beyond just grocery options.

title: Latest In Tech Layoffs: DoorDash Lays Off 1,250 - We Examine Their Financial Outlook For 2023
text: DoorDash announced that it would be laying off 6% of its workforce in this recent round of tech layoffs. We break down what this means for investors in DoorDash and what to expect from the delivery pros moving forward.

title: Walgreens Launches Free Paxlovid Delivery Services with DoorDash and Uber
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Today, in partnership with DoorDash and Uber, Walgreens announced free delivery of Paxlovid, a COVID-19 oral antiviral therapy, directly to the doorsteps of those who need it.

title: DoorDash - Your Dasher Is On The Way
text: DoorDash, Inc. stock has dropped nearly 62% YTD. We believe the stock pullback creates an attractive entry point to invest in the company. We believe DoorDash's YTD decline is a result of slowing total orders as the company lost its pandemic growth catalysts.

title: Tech jobs gain despite wave of layoff announcements, but warning signs abound
text: The tech industry continued to add jobs despite the tens of thousands of layoffs that were announced in November, though tech job postings continued a downward slide, according to an analysis of U.S. employment numbers released Friday.

title: Should You Buy DoorDash Stock Before the End of 2022?

title: DoorDash (DASH) Lays Off Staff Amid Economic Volatility
